steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C, $\frac{4}{21}$, is correct. Choice B, $\frac{1}{84}$, would come from using $(4x)^{-1}$; choice D, $\frac{21}{4}$, would come from using $\left(4^{-1}\right)x$; and choice A, $-84$, treats the function like a negative linear expression. The exponent applies only to $x$.
